name: BulkTrack
tagline: Product analytics. Funnels, cohorts, retention, user paths, real-time dashboards. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><linearGradient id="tc-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a2a4a"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0e1830"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="tc-fill" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#50cc70" stop-opacity=".4"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#50cc70" stop-opacity=".02"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="tc-frame" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ddd"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#aaa"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#888"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="10" y="10" width="80" height="62" rx="5" fill="url(#tc-frame)" stroke="#666" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="72" height="54" rx="2" fill="url(#tc-bg)"/><line x1="14" y1="30" x2="86" y2="30" stroke="#2a3a5a" stroke-width=".5"/><line x1="14" y1="45" x2="86" y2="45" stroke="#2a3a5a" stroke-width=".5"/><line x1="14" y1="55" x2="86" y2="55" stroke="#2a3a5a" stroke-width=".5"/><polygon points="18,60 30,52 45,55 58,38 72,28 82,20 82,64 18,64" fill="url(#tc-fill)"/><polyline points="18,60 30,52 45,55 58,38 72,28 82,20" fill="none" stroke="#50cc70" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><polyline points="18,60 30,52 45,55 58,38 72,28 82,20" fill="none" stroke="#80ff90" stroke-width="1" opacity=".5"/><circle cx="82" cy="20" r="3" fill="#80ff90" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1"/><polygon points="84,16 82,22 78,18" fill="#80ff90"/><rect x="40" y="72" width="20" height="6" rx="1" fill="#aaa" stroke="#888" stroke-width=".5"/><rect x="30" y="78" width="40" height="4" rx="2" fill="#bbb" stroke="#888" stroke-width=".5"/></svg>

features.title: Funnel Analysis
features.desc: Track conversion at every step. See where users drop off, compare segments, and identify optimization opportunities.

features.title: Cohort Retention
features.desc: Measure user stickiness over time. Weekly and monthly retention curves by signup date, feature usage, or any custom event.

features.title: User Path Analysis
features.desc: Visualize how users navigate your product. See the most common flows, unexpected detours, and dead ends.

features.title: Real-time Dashboards
features.desc: Live event streams and metric counters. See user activity as it happens. Custom dashboard layouts with drag-and-drop widgets.

features.title: Event Tracking
features.desc: Track any custom event with properties. Autocapture clicks, page views, and form submissions. No code changes needed.

features.title: Segmentation
features.desc: Slice data by user properties, behaviors, geography, device, or any custom attribute. Save segments for reuse across reports.

useCases.title: Product Teams
useCases.desc: Understand how users actually use your product. Find friction points, validate features, and drive data-informed decisions.

useCases.title: Growth Teams
useCases.desc: Track activation funnels, measure experiments, and identify your best retention levers. Scale what works.

useCases.title: Startups
useCases.desc: Get Mixpanel-grade analytics from day one without the Mixpanel price tag. Focus your budget on building, not measuring.
